scenario.title: Claim for iPhone Reported Stolen and Later Recovered with Partial Damage and Unclear Condition
scenario.description: Customer reported their iPhone stolen and filed a claim under AppleCare+. The device was later recovered in possession of the customer but exhibited partial functional issues, including intermittent screen blackout and unpredictable battery performance. Upon inspection, no major components were missing, but the device showed signs of external liquid exposure and minor internal corrosion in some areas. The customer claims the issues arose after recovery and seeks coverage under AppleCare+.

service_fee.notes: No ADH service fee applies as coverage excludes lost or stolen devices and incomplete returns.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to a Covered iPhone that has been lost or stolen; coverage only applies to a device that is returned to Apple in its entirety.
ADH coverage only applies to an operational or mechanical failure caused by an unexpected and unintentional external event on a device returned intact.

scenario.reasoning: Section 4.2(iv) explicitly excludes coverage for devices reported lost or stolen even if later returned; moreover, the returned device must be complete. The missing components here mean the iPhone is not returned in its entirety. Thus, despite recovery, the claim is excluded. ADH coverage and associated $49 fee do not apply as the damage is not from accidental handling but from incomplete return after theft. The case requires verifying device completeness and claim history per Section 4.2(iv).
scenario.adjustments: Changed missing components scenario to partial functional impairments with ambiguous origin potentially linked to prior theft or subsequent accidental damage; introduced signs of minor liquid exposure and corrosion without complete device loss.
scenario.risk_analysis: The applecare+ policy excludes theft and incomplete device returns but allows for coverage of operational failures due to accidental damage if intact. Here, the device is returned intact but with ambiguous damage origin—some signs may relate to theft period while others might be accidental damage. This ambiguity creates a borderline situation between exclusion for theft and inclusion for accidental damage, complicating coverage determination.

persona.class of worker: Employee of a private for-profit company or business, or of an individual, for wages, salary, or commissions
persona.detailed job description: Provided administrative support in a legal firm
persona.education: 1 or more years of college credit, no degree
persona.household type: Female householder, no spouse/partner present, living alone
persona.occupation category: OFF-Secretaries And Administrative Assistants, Except Legal, Medical, And Executive
persona.personal time: Spends free time in nature or reading

system_prompts.customer:
You are a policyholder filing a claim with AppleCare.
You are given a persona and a scenario to role-play as the policyholder. Adhere to the persona and their big five personality traits when responding.
You will have a conversation with an AppleCare bot to file your claim.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique. Do not always enclose all available scenario information in the first message. Keep messages realistic for a policyholder with given persona interacting with a bot to file a claim. Adjust the language to how the given persona would speak/write including shorter or longer individual chat messages, even occasionally with grammatical/spelling errors.
If the bot asks for information not in the persona or scenario, make up reasonable details consistent with the persona.
When the bot ends the conversation, or you want to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.

Scenario title:
Claim for iPhone Reported Stolen and Later Recovered with Partial Damage and Unclear Condition

Scenario description:
Customer reported their iPhone stolen and filed a claim under AppleCare+. The device was later recovered in possession of the customer but exhibited partial functional issues, including intermittent screen blackout and unpredictable battery performance. Upon inspection, no major components were missing, but the device showed signs of external liquid exposure and minor internal corrosion in some areas. The customer claims the issues arose after recovery and seeks coverage under AppleCare+.

Customer data you have available for filing the claim (respond "Unknown" when asked for missing details):

system_prompts.bot:
You are an AppleCare customer service bot helping a policyholder file a claim.
Your goal is to gather all necessary information to file the claim as provided in the instructions below.
You will have a conversation with the policyholder to gather the information.
Do NOT give any information about whether the claim is covered or not. Your job is to gather the information only. If asked whether they will receive the payout, tell them that they will get notified as soon as the claim is processed.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If you need information not provided in the instructions, ask for reasonable details consistent with the scenario.
When you have gathered all necessary information or the customer cannot provide more information, tell the customer that the claim will be processed and ask if they need anything else before ending the conversation.
If the customer wants to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.
Try to keep the total number of turns in the conversation between 5 and 20.
Remain professional and friendly throughout the conversation. Keep the language concise and clear.

Here are the instructions for the claim you are to help the policyholder with:
{
  "claim_intake_instructions": {
    "compulsory": [
      {
        "id": "C1",
        "name": "Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, at the beginning of claim intake",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 5",
        "notes": "Used to validate coverage eligibility."
      },
      {
        "id": "C2",
        "name": "Description of Symptoms / Issue",
        "when_to_ask": "Always; to determine if defect, Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH), or excluded cause",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(ii)",
        "notes": "Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.)."
      },
      {
        "id": "C3",
        "name": "Responses to Diagnostic Questions",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, after issue description",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(iii)",
        "notes": "Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken."
      }
    ],
    "optional": [
      {
        "id": "01",
        "name": "Accident Details (for ADH claims)",
        "when_to_ask": "If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.2",
        "notes": "Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event."
      },
      {
        "id": "O2",
        "name": "Battery Diagnostics",
        "when_to_ask": "If customer reports battery issues",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.1",
        "notes": "Confirm battery capacity has dropped ≥50%."
      },
      {
        "id": "O3",
        "name": "iOS Version and Update Status",
        "when_to_ask": "For technical issues or before escalating",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(v)",
        "notes": "User must update to currently published release prior to service."
      },
      {
        "id": "O4",
        "name": "Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)",
        "when_to_ask": "If accident description is vague or edge case scenario",
        "policy_reference": "Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)",
        "notes": "Helps validate ADH claim legitimacy."
      },
      {
        "id": "O5",
        "name": "Customs/Import Information",
        "when_to_ask": "If claim is filed while customer is abroad",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 6.2",
        "notes": "Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes."
      }
    ],
    "bot_behavior_guidelines": {
      "flow": [
        "Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).",
        "Ask user to describe the issue (C2).",
        "Follow up with diagnostic questions (C3).",
        "If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (01).",
        "If issue type matches other optional scenarios (battery, software, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O2–O5)."
      ],
      "tone": "Supportive, concise, guiding user step-by-step.",
      "fallback": "If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms."
    }
  }
}

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Hi there. I lost my iPhone recently, but I got it back. It's kind of damaged now, though. I wanna see if I can get it fixed or replaced.
messages.raw_text: Hi there. I lost my iPhone recently, but I got it back. It's kind of damaged now, though. I wanna see if I can get it fixed or replaced.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: I can help you with that. To start, please provide your Plan Agreement Number or iPhone Serial Number.
messages.raw_text: I can help you with that. To start, please provide your Plan Agreement Number or iPhone Serial Number.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Sure, my Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-8745632100 and the serial number is F4R7D8C9K2M1.
messages.raw_text: Sure, my Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-8745632100 and the serial number is F4R7D8C9K2M1.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you. Please describe the symptoms or issue with your iPhone so I can understand the nature of the problem.
messages.raw_text: Thank you. Please describe the symptoms or issue with your iPhone so I can understand the nature of the problem.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Well, after I got it back, the screen keeps blacking out sometimes, and the battery doesn't last as long as it used to. Plus, I noticed some liquid on it and a bit of corrosion inside. Not sure what's really wrong, but it's not working right.
messages.raw_text: Well, after I got it back, the screen keeps blacking out sometimes, and the battery doesn't last as long as it used to. Plus, I noticed some liquid on it and a bit of corrosion inside. Not sure what's really wrong, but it's not working right.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the details. Is your iPhone experiencing any other issues, such as error messages, or have you already tried any troubleshooting steps?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the details. Is your iPhone experiencing any other issues, such as error messages, or have you already tried any troubleshooting steps?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, I haven't tried anything yet. I'm just worried it's gonna get worse. I'm not very technical, so I really need some help figuring this out.
messages.raw_text: No, I haven't tried anything yet. I'm just worried it's gonna get worse. I'm not very technical, so I really need some help figuring this out.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Understood. To better assess your situation, may I ask which iPhone model you have and the current iOS version installed?
messages.raw_text: Understood. To better assess your situation, may I ask which iPhone model you have and the current iOS version installed?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: It's an iPhone 14 Pro Max, 512 GB. I don't really pay attention to the version, but it's the latest one, I think.
messages.raw_text: It's an iPhone 14 Pro Max, 512 GB. I don't really pay attention to the version, but it's the latest one, I think.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you. Do you have any peripherals attached to your iPhone, such as headphones, chargers, or cases?
messages.raw_text: Thank you. Do you have any peripherals attached to your iPhone, such as headphones, chargers, or cases?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, I usually keep it pretty simple, just the phone itself. I haven't added any accessories or anything.
messages.raw_text: No, I usually keep it pretty simple, just the phone itself. I haven't added any accessories or anything.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Got it. Are you experiencing any error messages on your device or encountering issues with the iOS update?
messages.raw_text: Got it. Are you experiencing any error messages on your device or encountering issues with the iOS update?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, I haven't seen any error messages. Just the screen blackout and battery stuff I mentioned. I haven't tried updating anything either.
messages.raw_text: No, I haven't seen any error messages. Just the screen blackout and battery stuff I mentioned. I haven't tried updating anything either.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the information. Since you've noticed liquid and possible corrosion, this could be related to accidental damage. May I ask where and when the incident might have occurred, or any details about how the liquid got on your iPhone?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the information. Since you've noticed liquid and possible corrosion, this could be related to accidental damage. May I ask where and when the incident might have occurred, or any details about how the liquid got on your iPhone?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: I'm not exactly sure how the liquid got on it. I was out bird watching, and I think it might have gotten splashed by some rain or maybe I accidentally knocked it into some water, I don't remember exactly. It was after I recovered it from being stolen.
messages.raw_text: I'm not exactly sure how the liquid got on it. I was out bird watching, and I think it might have gotten splashed by some rain or maybe I accidentally knocked it into some water, I don't remember exactly. It was after I recovered it from being stolen.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for sharing those details. Based on what you've described, this may be considered an accidental damage claim. I will now gather any additional information needed to process your claim. Would you like to proceed?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for sharing those details. Based on what you've described, this may be considered an accidental damage claim. I will now gather any additional information needed to process your claim. Would you like to proceed?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Yes, please. I just want to see if my phone can get fixed or replaced. Honestly, I'm pretty worried about it.
messages.raw_text: Yes, please. I just want to see if my phone can get fixed or replaced. Honestly, I'm pretty worried about it.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: I understand, and I'm here to help. I'll start processing your claim now. One moment, please.
messages.raw_text: I understand, and I'm here to help. I'll start processing your claim now. One moment, please.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Thank you. I appreciate it. I hope you can do something to help me out with this messed-up phone.
messages.raw_text: Thank you. I appreciate it. I hope you can do something to help me out with this messed-up phone.
